pages.textSample: ROSHN | Partnerships Home Click Here / Partnerships Partnerships Economic growth across different regions of the Kingdom As the leading national multi-asset class real estate developer, ROSHN Group is dedicated to creating transformative spaces and mixed-use destinations that reflect Saudi Arabia's dynamic vision for the future. We actively collaborate with the private sector, building long-term partnerships that drive progress and development across the Kingdom. pages.textSample: ROSHN | ALAROUS Home Click Here / Communities ALAROUS Phases Community Life Benefits Masterplan At Glance Sales centers Welcome to ALAROUS We are delighted to introduce ROSHN Group's first community in the Western Region, ALAROUS, within minutes from the Red Sea coast. Located in the vibrant city of Jeddah and adjoining MARAFY, ROSHN Group's recently announced visionary destination, ALAROUS residents embrace a new way of living in high-quality homes. All day-to-day amenities, such as schools, mosques and shops, are within walking distance, and the waterside restaurants, green open spaces and stunning event venues of MARAFY are found just a few minutes away over a footbridge. pages.textSample: ROSHN | WAREFA Home Click Here / Communities WAREFA Video Homes Community Life Benefits The Masterplan At Glance Services Location Sales centers Welcome to WAREFA Welcome to WAREFA Community, nestled in the rapidly growing east of Riyadh. Covering an expansive 1.4 million square meters, the community features 2,380 homes designed with the grace and sophistication of Salmani architecture. WAREFA’s homes open onto pedestrian-friendly tree-lined streets where neighbors come together, and amenities to enhance the quality of life of our residents are only minutes away. The careful design of the individual neighborhoods creates small clusters of homes, allowing residents to become friends, and families to connect.
